channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16068] Interop conf-sanity test_115: loop: Write error at byte offset
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/718fb549-2c33-4b94-b448-67273f765463

test_115 failed with the following error:

Timeout occurred after 572 minutes, last suite running was conf-sanity

Env:
server: 2.14.0
client: 2.15.1
MDS dmesg shows

[Mon Jul 18 03:53:01 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 934522048 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x4000 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:01 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 934523072 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x4000 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:01 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 934524096 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x0 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:03 2022] lo_write_bvec: 2375 callbacks suppressed
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:03 2022] loop: Write error at byte offset 478874877952, length 4096.
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:03 2022] loop: Write error at byte offset 478875123712, length 4096.
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:03 2022] loop: Write error at byte offset 478875648000, length 4096.
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:03 2022] loop: Write error at byte offset 478876172288, length 4096.
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:03 2022] loop: Write error at byte offset 478876696576, length 4096.
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:03 2022] loop: Write error at byte offset 478877220864, length 4096.
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:03 2022] loop: Write error at byte offset 478877745152, length 4096.
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:03 2022] loop: Write error at byte offset 478878269440, length 4096.
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:03 2022] loop: Write error at byte offset 478878793728, length 4096.
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:03 2022] loop: Write error at byte offset 478879318016, length 4096.
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:06 2022] print_req_error: 2258 callbacks suppressed
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:06 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 938192232 op 0x9:(WRITE_ZEROES) flags 0x400800 phys_seg 0 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:06 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 938203496 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x0 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:06 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 938204520 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x4000 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:06 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 938205544 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x4000 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:06 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 938206568 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x4000 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:06 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 938207592 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x0 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:06 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 938208616 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x4000 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:06 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 938209640 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x4000 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:06 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 938210664 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x4000 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:06 2022] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev loop0, sector 938211688 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x0 phys_seg 128 prio class 0
[Mon Jul 18 03:53:08 2022] lo_write_bvec: 2375 callbacks suppressed

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
conf-sanity test_115 - Timeout occurred after 572 minutes, last suite running was conf-sanity
item.summary: Interop conf-sanity test_115: loop: Write error at byte offset

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
